feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Copy Attachments from One Parent Entity Record to another.
entry.content:
Hi All.

We are having a business case scenario, where we need to copy attachments of one parent entity to another. We have developed the RAP Services in BTP ABAP ENV(Steampunk) and utilizing custom Fiori to consume them. I want to copy attachments of one Parent entity record to another. Is there any way I can do it in the controller.

 Steps to reproduce.
1. Develop RAP Service with two entities. First Entity with few fields and the second entity with MediaType(Attachment Entity).
2. Give Relation with Header to Item with First Entity Parent to Second(Attachment Entity).
3.Now Develop a custom Fiori application to create a record and attachments.
4. Now create a function to copy the first record along with attachments.

entry.title: SAP B1 - AP Invoice - Exchange Rate
entry.content:
Hi community,

On the AP Invoice screen, for SAP B1, please could anyone tell me how I could make the field for 'OPCH, DocRate' be visible but not active? We want it to show, but don't want users to be able to change the field value, the currency exchange rate is set for the year and it pulls through automatically. We have had a situation where a user has manually changed this field by mistake, and we're looking to stop this happening again! I've looked in the form settings but can't seem to see this field, it may be called something else in the form settings though?

Picture below, thanks in advance 🙂

entry.title: Bypass Standard popup while creating external number range
entry.content: I want to generate an external batch number, but before that I am getting the below standard popup. Can someone help, how do I ignore or bypass this check.

entry.title: NPS WRONG DEDUCTION
entry.content:
in India Payroll , After implementing Union Budget 2024-25  Patches ,system is Generated  NPS contribtion for for all the employees for whom we have not opted for NPS Contribution in Infotype 587

Please provide the solution.

 

Patch installed

SAP_HR

608

118

SAPKE608B8

136

SAPKE608D6

Human Resources

entry.title: CORS Error in SAP Build Apps - OData API Call
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,
 
I'm experiencing a CORS (Cross-Origin Resource Sharing) error while calling an OData API from SAP Build Apps. Despite configuring the API and app settings, I continue to encounter this issue.
 
Error Details:
  • Error Message: 
  • Platform: SAP Build Apps 
  • OData API Version: V2.0
  • Browser/Platform: Mozilla/5.0
Steps Taken:
  • Verified API and app credentials
  • Tested API calls using tools like Postman (successful)
  • Configuring proxy settings in SAP Build
  • Adding CORS headers manually in the API requests
  • Using CORS-enabled libraries
Question:
Can anyone provide guidance on resolving this CORS error in SAP Build Apps? Are there specific settings or configurations I'm missing? Specifically:
  • How to configure SAP Build to handle CORS requests?
  • Best practices for handling CORS in SAP Build apps?
  • Any known workarounds or third-party libraries that can help resolve this issue?
Thank you for your assistance.
 
Best regards,
Aman K.

entry.title: BATMAS Setup: Sending BATMAS to external system when a new field (to add) is updated
entry.content:
Hello everyone

I have a task to do. It's necessary to send BATMAS to external systems when a new field X (to be added) is filled once the production is over. This new field X is linked to the batch and it's not present into the BATMAS03 standard IDoc.

I'd like to ask you something.

Regarding IDoc structure, considering BATMAS structure, where the new field should be added?
Regarding IDoc, is it necessary to add any change pointers related to the new field?

The idea is that, once the material has been created, and the batch is created too, the new value X will be linked to the material's batch once the production is over.

Any idea on how to solve this?

entry.title: API to get details of purchase order changes in S4 Hana public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I am looking for API which gives list of  changes in Purchase order

Regards 

C Rao

entry.title: [BUG] one today question shows the answer from another question
entry.content:
I clicked this link "Re: Transport code of a query" in my notification feed

The link in the notification feed is exactly this one: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/transport-code-of-a-query/qaq-p/13875579/comment-id/56906#M56906

After clicking it, I go to the question Transport code of a query - SAP Community (today 2024/09/24) but the answer shown is the one from Solved: Cannot find proper SAPEXE and SAPEXEDB during inst... - SAP Community (2017).

If you go to this latter question and click on "Go to solution" you get https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/cannot-find-proper-sapexe-and-sapexedb-during-installing-solution-manager-7/qaq-p/428068/comment-id/56906#M56906.

As you can see, the common thing is that we have "comment-id/56906#M56906" in the two links, hence probably the mixing of the two questions.

EDIT / IMPORTANT: after refreshing the Notification Feed page, the link is now fixed (!?), it's https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/re-transport-code-of-a-query/qaq-p/13875643/comment-id/4885247#M4885247.

entry.title: Negative stock on 916 storage type
entry.content:
At one of our clients there is stuck negative stock on 916.
This happened due to a TO confirmed with 0 actual quantity, then the GI was posted for the delivery. Several deliveries affected.
No TR for the materials.
No open TO for the materials.
The stock is listed as pick/putaway quantity - I believe this should not have happened, may have happened due to some buggy development.
LT01/LT10 does not work as it says stock is zero at the source. The delivery can no longer be processed.

Any solution suggestions that does not involve cancelling the whole process?

entry.title: is there any APIs are available for HANA to Park the invoice?
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Is there any APIs are available for Parking the invoice

 

Thanks

entry.title: Mass Deletion of Contact Person - Customer Master Data
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

I need to delete/remove a contact person (with a dedicated functionID) from the customer master data (XD02). This should be done massively

I tried with an LSMW but there's no way to say to the recording the position that we want to delete/remove, it change from customer to customer.

Also checked with XD99 (MASS) transaction but there's only have the option to create/update and not to delete.

Any other idea how to do it in a "functional" way?

Kind regards

Joao Pereira

entry.title: IW73 Plan Total Cost Glitch
entry.content:
Hey everyone,

In IW73 I have jobs that show a Plan Total Cost that goes up exponentially every time I refresh or log back in and access the order. I have jobs up to 58 million that started out at only 15,000. Is this a known bug or could it be from an external app? We use Salesforce too.

entry.title: Capturing Survey Response in C4C
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We need to capture survey responses in C4C that will be sent from a third-party system. I’ve reviewed the OData documentation, which states that we can’t create survey responses via the API. Is there an alternative approach we can consider to achieve this?

entry.title: print push integration (SAP_COM_0467)
entry.content:
Hi 

We are in the process of implementing external printing or OMS on S4 Public Cloud using SAP BTP print service, integration suite and CPM, but we are having an issue with the SAP_COM_0647 (Push integration) which seems to only trigger or send a notification to call a BTP integration suite endpoint when you open or refresh the Maintain Print queue app and not when there is a new queue item added. 

Regards

JP

entry.title: Physical inventory count
entry.content: While creating physical inventory count in MI04, I have a list of 250 line items, how do I select the check boxes all at a time? selecting it individually is consuming more time.

entry.title: How to know the topic owner details in SAP Community Portal
entry.content:
I could not find any owner names in that page although i opened the topic page. What is the way to identify the owner of that topic/page ?

Ex: Topic : 

ABAP Development
https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/abap 

Br

Kiran K

entry.title: Enabling Custom Database Fields for Usage in SAP Fiori Applications hyperlink not working
entry.content:
Hello TEAM,

I am unable to view the link  Enabling Custom Database Fields for Usage in SAP Fiori Applications mentioned in OSS Note - 2320132 - S4TWL - Custom Fields. 

Any help in this regard?

BR,

Ajay

entry.title: mC93 - no material type for product groups exist in table T134
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to run MC93 after haveing created an info structure S976 as a copy of S076, maintained MC7F, MC8C (created the planungs type as a copy of the standard SOPKAPAM) and after having done MC61 I tried to run MC93, enered a mat nr and the plant, and got the error message MA151 no material type for product groups exist in table T134.

I created a mat type PROD and then also a Zxxx in OMS2, both with 1 for product group type but in T134 the field KZGRP is empty. is this the reason why I face the issue? what shall I do now?

 

best regards,

WalterMe

entry.title: Unable to release the service order showing an error message
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am assigning to repaired order to service order system showing an error message below.

I created a service notification and created a repaired order.

Reururn delivery created,

When creating the service order via the repaired order system, it shows an error message.System not to allow release the service order.

The item category N determined by the System is not a stock item category

Message No. IW822

Regards

HN

entry.title: How to Add Attachment to BP Store Business document
entry.content:
Hello,

Please suggest, how to add an attachment(PDF) to BP(tcode) Store Business Document through the ABAP Program.
